summary: Start M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 as the next systemic interaction recovery task after M7-CORE-ACTION-LOOP-UX-001 closed through PR #218. The task must synchronize strategic map selection, task rail cards, district list, and right inspector into one decision surface, reduce default route/obligation/risk overlay clutter, and use player-language legends/labels without changing authoritative simulation, protocol, save, content, final art, server, telemetry, or manual node battle scope.

tests_run.command: git status --short --branch; git branch --show-current; git rev-parse HEAD; git rev-parse origin/main
tests_run.result: PASS; local main and origin/main were synchronized at 26e5bf687e6607bc06a6af345bb0a23b2fcf5ad1 before creating the task branch.

decisions.decision: Start M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 immediately after M7-CORE-ACTION-LOOP-UX-001 closure entered main.
The goal is a usable low-fidelity strategic decision map, not final art or high-fidelity prototype work.
No sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, final art, or manual node battle scope is authorized.

risks.summary: If task rail, map, district list, and inspector do not share focus/action semantics, the product-owner complaint about not knowing what to do will remain unresolved.

requested_action: Implement the map/task rail/inspector decision-surface synchronization and route to systems_architect review.
